welcome.subject: Welcome to AskBiz — your first sale takes 2 minutes
welcome.heading: Hi {firstName}, you're in.
welcome.body: AskBiz is your till, your stock tracker, and your end-of-day report — on the phone already in your pocket. Here's all it takes:
welcome.step1: Point your camera at a product — no barcode gun, no setup.
welcome.step2: Take M-Pesa, mobile money, cash or card.
welcome.step3: Tonight, see exactly what you made and what's running low.
welcome.closing: Stuck on anything? Reply to this email — a real person reads it.

reengage_7.subject: Hi {firstName} — quick check-in from AskBiz
reengage_7.heading: Just checking in.
reengage_7.body1: Hi {firstName} — just noticed it's been about a week. No pressure, running a business is busy work.
reengage_7.body2: Everything's exactly where you left it: your data, your dashboard, your free plan. If you got stuck on anything, reply and I'll help directly.
reengage_7.cta: Pick up where you left off →
reengage_7.closing: Your account and the free plan are exactly where you left them.

reengage_14.subject: Where have you been, {firstName}? Your numbers miss you
reengage_14.heading: It's been a while.
reengage_14.body1: Hi {firstName} — we noticed you haven't been in lately. No guilt trip. Just a reminder of what's waiting:
reengage_14.body2: Every sale rung on your phone. Stock that warns you before it runs out. And at the end of the day, one number that matters: what you actually made.
reengage_14.cta: Pick up where you left off →
reengage_14.closing: Your account and the free plan are exactly where you left them. If something didn't work for you, reply and tell us — we read every one.

reengage_30.subject: We've kept everything for you, {firstName}
reengage_30.heading: It's been a month.
reengage_30.body1: Hi {firstName} — it's been a month, so I wanted to check in myself rather than let this go quiet.
reengage_30.body2: Your account, your data, your free plan — none of it has gone anywhere. If AskBiz wasn't the right fit, I'd genuinely like to know why — reply and tell me, no hard feelings. If you just got busy, your first sale is still 2 minutes away whenever you're ready.

plan_upgrade.subject: Welcome to {planName}, {firstName}!
plan_upgrade.heading: Hi {firstName}, welcome to {planName}!
plan_upgrade.body: We're thrilled you've upgraded. Here's what just switched on for you:
plan_upgrade.closing: If anything about {planName} isn't working the way you need it to, just reply to this email — I'll personally make sure it's sorted.

pos_welcome.subject: Welcome to AskBiz POS, {firstName}!
pos_welcome.heading: Hi {firstName}, welcome to AskBiz POS!
pos_welcome.body1: We're thrilled you've added AskBiz POS — welcome to the family.
pos_welcome.body2: Your till, your stock tracker, and your end-of-day report are live now, right alongside the rest of your AskBiz account.
pos_welcome.closing: If anything isn't working the way you need it to, just reply to this email — I'll personally make sure it's sorted.
